name: District of Columbia Speech-Language Pathologist License
description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to District of Columbia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Board of Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology
provider.parentOrganization: DC Department of Health (DOH), Health Regulation and Licensing Administration

address.streetAddress: 899 North Capitol St. NE, Washington, DC 20002
address.description: DC Department of Health, Health Regulation and Licensing Administration, 899 North Capitol Street NE, Washington, DC 20002

requiredDocuments.name: Praxis exam score report
requiredDocuments.description: Score of 162 or higher on test 5331.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a DC SLP license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The total initial cost is approximately $187. Biennial renewal is $164.

mainEntity.name: Is DC part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. DC has not enacted ASLP-IC legislation as of 2026.

mainEntity.name: Does DC allow telepractice for SLPs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. DC permits telepractice but requires a valid DC SLP license.

mainEntity.name: Does District of Columbia have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers speech-language pathologist practice in District of Columbia. To work in District of Columbia, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to District of Columbia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 8 weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in District of Columbia while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
